descriptions.value: Windir is the main character and an amazing explorer in the world of Labyronia.
The assassin responsible for killing the head master.  Who paid him to commit the heinous crime?!
Dinyon is the most powerful fire mage in the mysteria tower.  He was assassinated and no one knows why.  Can you discover the Dinyon's murderer?
Ibiz can look scary but he will always lend a helping hand if needed.  Of course its always good to watch your back!
Make sure to get advice from everyone in order to find your way around Labyronia.

These bunnies were once captains in the armies of the skeleton bunny king. Now, nothing but a mindless bunny husk of death and fire.
Mutated by powerful dark magic, these sheep are the muscle of the Sheep army, able to absorb massive amounts of damage. Their size and fierceness strikes fear into even the toughest foe.
The lightning wizards are members of a powerful and ancient order, once thought to be friendly, but in a dark quest for power, have joined forces with the undead armies of the Bunny King.

The Corgi Hating Hydras are one of the deadliest creatures known to Corgi kind. The Magic Shield Aura spell was originally developed with these monstrosities in mind, as a way to protect against too many hydra heads shooting too many scary fireballs.

Birthed by dark wizards from the cold rock and ice of the Bear King's mountains, the Ice Golems have made travel through these lands nearly impossible. Those who encounter them, rarely live to tell the tale.
The most powerful warlock known to corgi kind.
